mentions.note: Stock bottoming per Cramer but likely to struggle this quarter; won't have huge year as market prefers hardware; upside present but software facing headwinds vs. hardware winners in AI cycle.
Trading poorly alongside Microsoft; too similar positioning; Cramer recommends selling to preserve capital and add J&J and RTX for better diversification.
